cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 1940 · 重慶
cover.subtitle:
임시정부의 정규군,
충칭에서 깃발을 들다.
cover.imagePrompt: Late-Joseon-to-Japanese-occupation illustration. Dark blue-gray, crimson accent, sepia. ONE Korean independence general (Ji Cheong-cheon) in dark green wool military uniform with peaked cap, sash, and beard, standing in salute, profile view. Behind him: silhouettes of three Korean soldiers in similar uniforms in formation, holding rifles. Background: a Chinese stone-arched building gate suggesting Chongqing's Jialing Hotel. Color: dark blue-gray + ink-black, accent of crimson on sash and shoulder mark. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 독수리 작전 준비, 일본 항복으로 무산.

items.name: 지청천
items.desc: 만주 독립군 출신, 광복군 창설 지휘.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 광복군 창설 시기·장소·총사령관, 9개 행동준승 폐지(1944), 인면전구공작대, OSS 협력과 국내진공작전 무산(8.15)이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small Taegeukgi-shape silhouette suggesting national flag (no actual flag pattern detail). Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
